questions.question: Paul says the love of money is the root of what?
questions.feedback: The love of money is a root of all kinds of evil.

questions.question: What does Paul say is great gain when combined with contentment?
questions.feedback: Godliness with contentment is great gain.

questions.question: Paul says we brought nothing into the world and we can take nothing out of it.
questions.feedback: We brought nothing into the world and cannot take anything out of it.

questions.question: Paul tells Timothy to fight the good fight of _____.
questions.feedback: Fight the good fight of faith and take hold of eternal life.

questions.question: Paul tells the rich not to set their hopes on the uncertainty of _____ but on God.
questions.feedback: The rich should not hope in uncertain riches but in God who provides.
